name: Upload supporting docs to Mercury for the LLC bank account
description: Caleb task — log into mercury.com, navigate to the application/documents area, and upload the documents Jed has placed in D:\\Mercury-uploads\\ on his PC.
trigger_examples: send the LLC paperwork to mercury
prompt_template: Caleb: open Chrome to mercury.com → sign in → navigate to the Shultz Enterprises application/documents section. For each file in D:\\Mercury-uploads\\, click Upload, attach the file, confirm the type matches the document (LLC confirmation, EIN, ID, etc.). Take a screenshot of the final document list and return it to Solomon.
escalation_conditions: Mercury asks to verify identity / 2FA / phone code — pause and tell Jed
any document is missing or mislabeled in D:\\Mercury-uploads — pause
notes: Marked irreversible=true → ALWAYS escalates to Jed. Bank-account-touching action.
